# City Landscape Supplies Depot

> Edmonton, Alberta landscape supply yard. We sell mulch, decorative rock, topsoil, sand and gravel by the cubic yard, and rent landscaping equipment.

Site: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com
Address: 1404 78 Ave NW, Edmonton, AB T6P 0B8, Canada
Phone: (780) 490-0306
Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 9am–5pm, Sun closed

## Key pages
- Home: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/
- Shop (mulch, rock, soil, sand): https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/shop
- Equipment rentals: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/rentals
- Blog (landscaping guides): https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/blog
- About: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/about
- Contact / request a quote: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/contact
- 10% off first order: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/promo
- Sitemap: https://citylandscapesuppliesdepot.com/sitemap.xml

## How quotes work
Customers add items to a quote cart (priced per cubic yard) and submit contact details. Our team confirms availability, delivery fee, and total before charging — no online payment required.
